test-method.name: testSuccessfulPurchaseWorkflow
test-method.description: Verify user can login and complete a successful purchase workflow

test-method.name: testLockedOutUserWorkflow
test-method.description: Verify appropriate error message is displayed for locked out users

test-method.name: testAllProductsDynamicStructure
test-method.description: Loop through all products and validate their details page structure
